title: polypodium stenurum
intro: Polypodium stenurum, also known as Polypodium leucotomos, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, native to Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Polypodium stenurum include its potential to protect against UV-induced damage, improve immune function, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial activity. Herbal preparations of Polypodium stenurum can be found in various forms, including capsules, tablets, and topical creams, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
